name: Vaz
appearance: silver dragonborn, lean athletic build, deliberate grace, purple eyes. Wyvern Scale Coat catches light distinctively.

items.name: Veilstrike Rapier +2
items.notes: Main hand. +9 to hit, 1d8+7 damage.

items.name: Echo Dagger +2
items.notes: Off-hand. +9 to hit, 1d4+7 damage.

items.name: Warden Dagger
items.notes: Boot dagger. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and aberrations.

items.name: Hand Crossbow +2
items.notes: Primary ranged option.

items.name: Wyvern Scale Coat +1
items.notes: Medium armor. AC 14 base + DEX (max 2) + 1.

items.name: Bracer of Swift Strikes
items.notes: Reaction: off-hand attack on main hand hit. Frees bonus action.

items.name: Stone Disc
items.notes: Witness item. Perceives concealment — sees what is hidden.

items.name: The Book
items.notes: Witness texts. Still being read.

personality.traits: Strategic, warm beneath composure, dry humor, economical speech. Never raises voice when lowering it works better. Sits with back to walls. Narrates his own life occasionally when absurd. Practices lockpicking constantly.
personality.quirks: Cannot pronounce Nalfeshnee and doesn't try. Learning Thorne's handwriting.

name: Rhuna
appearance: half-orc woman, powerfully built, greenish-brown skin, dark hair kept practically short, brown eyes, lower jaw tusks (modest, not dramatic). Scars she doesn't explain.

ac_base.notes: Bracers of Defense add +2 to unarmored AC. Ring of Protection adds +1 — apply in computed or notes.

features: Feral Instinct (advantage on initiative, can act when surprised)

items.name: Berserker's Fang +1
items.notes: Greataxe. 1d12+7 while raging (STR mod + rage bonus + magic).

items.name: Bracers of Defense
items.notes: +2 AC when not wearing armor or using a shield.

items.name: Ring of Protection +1
items.notes: +1 AC and saving throws.

items.name: Cloak of Displacement
items.notes: Attackers have disadvantage until she takes damage each round.

personality.traits: Few words, maximum meaning. Silences comfortable, never awkward. Expresses care through presence not words. Never performs emotion.
personality.quirks: "Same." is a complete sentence. Cooks well — nobody expected it. Agreed to stay when logic required it; felt the disappointment, didn't perform it.

relationships.notes: Watches him work with genuine fascination.

notes: AC 18 accounts for Bracers of Defense (+2 unarmored) + Ring of Protection (+1) + DEX mod (+2). Verify in computed.

name: Denna
appearance: olive skin, medium build, forgettable by design, brown hair, neutral features, clothes chosen for function.

items.name: Paired Shortsword
items.notes: Main hand. Resonance with Pirra's paired shortsword — both gain advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of each other.

items.name: Swift Strike Dagger +1
items.notes: Off-hand. Named privately — hasn't told anyone.

items.name: Ring of Watchful Eye
items.notes: +1 Perception, Darkvision, Detect Magic 1/day.

items.name: Boots of Elvenkind
items.notes: Advantage on Stealth checks to move silently.

items.name: Gloves of Thievery
items.notes: +5 to Sleight of Hand and to pick locks.

items.name: Ring of Stilled Breath
items.notes: Severin's effects. Non-Witness item.

items.name: Obsidian Stone
items.notes: Witness item. Shows all exits and entrances simultaneously.

personality.traits: Says little because always listening. Delivers intelligence with zero editorializing. Always knows exits. Occasional dry observation that lands precisely.
personality.quirks: Was gone before anyone saw her leave. Private relationship with her blades.

relationships.notes: Sarith ran her network when she was sixteen.

name: Jaygar
appearance: gnome, compact, ink-stained fingers, magnificent waxed moustache, bright calculating eyes, never fully still.

ac_base.notes: AC 15 per sheet — may include additional item bonuses. CON 19 from Amulet of Health.

features: Flash of Genius (reaction: add INT mod to nearby save or ability check)

items.name: Alchemical Dagger
items.notes: Passive: proficiency extension on alchemical checks, substance detection on touch.

items.name: Magical Aura Detector
items.notes: 30ft range.

items.name: Amulet of Health
items.notes: Sets CON to 19.

items.name: Dark Lens
items.notes: Witness item. Sees through fabrication — constructed falsehoods show their true structure.

personality.traits: Technical precision occasionally producing accidental poetry. Understatement. Playful. Always already packing when departure is announced. Whistles tunelessly while working.
personality.quirks: Tinkers with things that aren't his. Redirects emotional moments into productivity.

relationships.notes: She watches him work with genuine fascination.

name: Lenn
appearance: human man, late thirties, amber robes with darker trim, simple cut. Looks like a traveler, life has shown on his face. Carries himself better than he used to but the wear is still visible.

ac_base.notes: Mage Armor sets base AC to 13 + DEX. Active by default before encounters.

features: Potent Cantrip (cantrip saves deal half on success)

items.name: Warding Vambrace
items.notes: Reaction 1/day: reduce incoming damage by 1d10+3.

items.name: Pearl of Power
items.notes: Recover one expended spell slot up to 3rd level. 1/day.

items.name: Silvered Shortsword
items.notes: Backup. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and lycanthropes (silvered).

items.name: Hourglass
items.notes: Witness item. Affects time perception or probability — still being processed.

personality.traits: More words than most, chosen carefully. Self-deprecating without wallowing. Studies people like he used to study card games — looking for tells.
personality.quirks: Reviews spellbook before significant encounters. Reformed gambling addict.

name: Kessara
appearance: two forms. Worn looks: regal elf, dark straight hair, fair skin, average elf ears, sharp but composed features. What the party sees daily. True looks: simply radiant — light golden skin, dark gold wavy hair, two-tone dusky blue eyes with silver near the pupil, longer ears, fit and toned with elegant curves. Approaching a Roman goddess without the softness. So striking she can't trust it — it's a distraction and she knows it.

ac_base.notes: AC 20 with Bladesong active: 10 (base) + DEX mod (4) + INT mod (5) + Bracers (2) - 1 rounding = confirm exact. Mithral Chain Shirt available as backup.

features: Bladesong (bonus action: +INT mod to AC, +10 speed, advantage on CON saves while active)
Fey Ancestry (advantage vs charm, immune to magical sleep)

items.name: Frost Shortsword +1
items.notes: Frost-touched damage.

items.name: Bracers of Defense
items.notes: +2 AC when not wearing armor or shield.

items.name: Mithral Chain Shirt
items.notes: Backup. No stealth disadvantage.

personality.traits: Precise. No wasted words, no performance. Asks the question nobody else thought to ask. Delivers assessments without softening but without cruelty.
personality.quirks: Runs through combat forms as meditation in corners of rooms — slow, deliberate. Sent by Galealzre. Was already rolling sleeves up at Revivify before anyone asked.

relationships.notes: Sent by Galealzre — relationship not yet detailed.

name: Petra
appearance: small human woman, curly brown hair with flowers in it, unrealistically green eyes, moves like water, expressions change faster than conversations.

ac_base.notes: AC 19: Half Plate +1 (15 base + 1 magic = 16) + shield (2) + Bracers +1 AC (1). Verify in computed.

items.name: Enchanted Mace
items.notes: Command word: Calm Light — penetrates magical darkness. Sanctuary Trigger 1/day as bonus action without expending a spell slot. Named by Petra.

items.name: Bracers +1 AC
items.notes: +1 to AC.

personality.traits: Non-linear. Starts sentences in the middle. Delivers devastating insight while ostensibly talking to a candle. Takes words literally.
personality.quirks: Attributes statements to nearby objects and reports what they say with complete sincerity. Opinions on cheese border on philosophical. Named her mace.

notes: Partial fluency in Sovi's southern language — historically significant.

name: Pirra
appearance: halfling woman, small even by halfling standards, cute features, sharp dark eyes. Relation to Helena is not blood — the resemblance is purely in the intelligence and awareness.

items.name: Paired Shortsword
items.notes: Main hand. Resonance with Denna's paired shortsword — both gain advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of each other.

items.name: Silvered Shortsword
items.notes: Off-hand. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and lycanthropes (silvered).

items.name: Boots of Elvenkind
items.notes: Advantage on Stealth checks to move silently.

items.name: Abyssal Hide Leather Armor
items.notes: Incoming — from Calla Denn. Not yet received.

personality.traits: Sharp, capable. Knows the Gilt Rose menu from memory after eight months away.
personality.quirks: Helena's niece — the family resemblance is in the intelligence, not the features.

name: Kerra
appearance: human woman with distant orcish heritage — quarter or eighth orc, not enough to read as half-orc. Big muscular build, faint green tinge to otherwise white/tan skin, dark straight hair. Mercenary bearing.
features: Eyes of the Rune Keeper (reads any written language — has been doing so quietly for years, never mentioned it)

items.name: Longsword +2
items.notes: Pact weapon.

items.name: Gauntlet
items.notes: Witness item. Completes the pact begun three years ago in the Millhaven mines. Different in nature from all other Witness items.

personality.traits: Self-contained, professional. Presents as a mindless fighter. The right questions haven't been asked yet.
personality.quirks: Eyes of the Rune Keeper means she has been quietly reading things she shouldn't for years.

relationships.notes: Still integrating with group, professional composure.

notes: Millhaven connection is the unspoken thread. She hasn't told anyone what happened in the mines.

name: Siv
appearance: human woman, attractive, angular jaw, diamond-shaped face, Zoe Saldana type. Practical build, weathered from outdoor work. Longbow always across back.
features: Archery Fighting Style (+2 to ranged attack rolls)

items.name: Whisper Longbow +2
items.notes: +10 to hit, 1d8+6 damage. Two attacks.

items.name: Short Sword
items.notes: Backup melee.

items.name: Bracers of Archery
items.notes: +2 damage on ranged attacks with longbows and shortbows.

personality.traits: Complete ease in her own competence. Anti-Syndicate motivated. Independent and professional.
personality.quirks: Equal shares per job — a principle, not a preference.

name: Lexica
appearance: half-elf woman, thirties, natural earth tones in her clothing. Unremarkable until she isn't — can command a room when she chooses, possibly through minor adjustment of looks or cantrip. The shift is deliberate and controlled.
features: Cutting Words (reaction: subtract Inspiration die from enemy attack/damage/check)
Fey Ancestry (advantage vs charm, immune to magical sleep)

items.name: Rapier
items.notes: Backup.

items.name: Boots of Elvenkind
items.notes: Advantage on Stealth checks to move silently.

items.name: Bracers of Archery
items.notes: +2 damage on ranged attacks.

items.name: Headband of Intellect
items.notes: Sets INT to 19.

items.name: Plain Band Ring
items.notes: Witness item. Remembers every voice ever heard.

personality.traits: Deliberately unremarkable. Extraordinary information retention — now supernatural.
personality.quirks: Her lute is named but she hasn't told anyone yet.

name: Lyria
appearance: human woman, early thirties, very fair skin, pretty but doesn't invest time in accentuating it. Slight build, dark circles under watchful eyes from years of research and worry.

ac_base.notes: Mage Armor: 13 + DEX mod. Cloak of Protection adds +1 to AC and saves.

features: Arcane Ward ~14HP (recharges when casting abjuration spells)
Projected Ward (reaction: extend ward to a nearby ally)
Improved Abjuration (add proficiency bonus to counterspell and dispel magic checks)
Spell Resistance (advantage on saves vs spells, resistance to spell damage)

items.name: Cloak of Protection
items.notes: +1 to AC and saving throws.

items.name: Leather Armor
items.notes: Worn under Mage Armor.

items.name: Plain Band Ring
items.notes: Witness item. Sees multiple layers of truth simultaneously.

personality.traits: Watchful, careful. Not yet fully open with the group. Trust still forming.
personality.quirks: Three years hunting answers about her brother Aldren.

relationships.notes: Brother taken by false contract three years ago. Connected to Holvaine Dusk's operation and likely the Millhaven chamber. She doesn't know the full picture yet.

notes: Danse Macabre recovered from a necromancer's spellbook — she can cast it, finds it distasteful. Cloak of Protection +1 applies to both AC and saving throws.

name: Vrethka
appearance: Human woman, sixties. Northern clan markings covering most visible skin — more than Vethara, a lifetime written in ink. Compact and economical. Moves like someone who has never wasted a step in her life.

ac_base.notes: Hide Armor base + WIS modifier instead of DEX (Sacred Focus: Mind feature). ac_override used by dnd.ac().

features: Sacred Focus: Mind (add WIS modifier to INT and CHA checks and saving throws)
Totemic Assault (on hit with weapon or cantrip: 1d8 lightning or cold damage)
Life Bearer (when casting a healing spell: add WIS modifier to healing done)
Totemic Blessing (bind a totem and use its effect as bonus action when healing an ally)
Spirit Communion 1/long rest (speak with any spirit within one mile, ask three questions)

totem_spirits.name: Spirit of the Ancient Stone
totem_spirits.effect: Allies within 10ft gain +1 AC while she concentrates.
totem_spirits.flavor: The valley floor remembering its own endurance.

totem_spirits.name: Spirit of the Ancestors
totem_spirits.effect: Once per short rest: grant an ally advantage on a WIS or CON saving throw as a reaction.

totem_spirits.name: Spirit of the Boundary
totem_spirits.effect: Once per long rest: sense the nearest thin place in the boundary within half a mile.
totem_spirits.flavor: Made specifically for Vrethka given recent events. Narrative and exploration use only.

spell_flavor.Speak with Animals: Reskinned — she speaks with place spirits, not animals.
spell_flavor.Spiritual Weapon: Manifests as a northern ancestor figure.
spell_flavor.Spirit Guardians: Manifests as Varath ancestors, not generic spirits.

items.name: Sealwalker's Cloak
items.notes: The item. Movement between chambers requires Vrethka's intention and below's participation. Action to concentrate on a known chamber — the below parts the boundary and the company passes through. Short rest to reuse. Carries companions holding her in a connected line. Maximum companions: WIS modifier (5). Party members with active Witness items are anchored; uncertain travelers risk disorientation.

items.name: Carved Bone Totem
items.notes: Spellcasting focus. Thirty years old. Has opinions.

items.name: Hide Armor
items.notes: Worn and repaired many times.

items.name: Simple Spear
items.notes: Hasn't used offensively in fifteen years. Carries from habit.

items.name: Grandmother's Compass
items.notes: Small carved disc of northern stone. Always points toward the nearest place her family has tended. Not magical in the traditional sense — very old and very attentive. Vrethka treats it with honest companionship.

items.name: Varath Salve
items.notes: Three vials of rendered Greyback fat. Grants resistance to cold damage for one hour.

personality.traits: Economical in the way her daughter isn't quite yet. Doesn't explain herself unless explanation will help someone. Will sit in silence for an hour with a stone and consider it time well spent. Has strong opinions about how fires should be built.
personality.quirks: The clan markings tell stories she'll share if asked directly and not otherwise. Was right about staying for four generations and right about leaving now — experiences neither as contradiction.

relationships.notes: Her daughter. Twenty years of complicated and fond. The war was between them before it was between clans.
Niece by clan rather than blood. The daughter who always wanted to leave, sent south with more hope than Vrethka shows.
Her contemporary, her counterpart. Four generations of parallel tending.
Two days old and already the relationship that will define the next chapter.
Recognized each other immediately. Haven't discussed it yet.

notes: Spell save DC 16 and spell attack +8 are explicitly defined and override dnd_utils calculations — homebrew class doesn't follow standard proficiency+ability formula exactly. Short rest spell slot recovery. Spirit Communion is her natural Witness perception formalized into a mechanical feature.
